label: 过滤网格
description: 过滤网格列表，移除非零格数量小于阈值的网格
description-en: Filters a list of grids, removing any grid whose non-zero cell count is below the threshold.
icon: 一组矩形网格排列，部分带叉号被划掉，旁边有数字阈值标注，扁平插画风格，简洁小图标，主色2种。

inputs.name: gridList
inputs.label: 网格列表
inputs.description: 输入的网格列表（当前父分支的全部直接子分支作为一组）
inputs.description-en: Input list of grids (all immediate children of the current parent branch, fed as a set).

inputs.name: minSize
inputs.label: 最小非零格数
inputs.description: 非零格数量的最小阈值；非零格数量严格小于此值的网格将被移除
inputs.description-en: Minimum non-zero cell count threshold; grids with fewer non-zero cells than this value are removed.

outputs.name: outputGridList
outputs.label: 过滤后网格列表
outputs.description: 移除小尺寸网格后的结果列表，顺序与输入一致；每张保留网格成为独立子分支
outputs.description-en: Filtered grid list with small grids removed, preserving input order; each kept grid becomes its own child branch.
